name: shared-prefix
description: Controlled prefix-cache probe: 80% of requests begin with a shared 1024-token prefix in groups of 16 (system-prompt / few-shot template reuse); the input floor (1152) always exceeds the prefix, so every sharing request carries a unique suffix. The sharing ratio is the experiment's single controlled variable - prefix-caching experiments (IB-T011) compare this workload against a ratio-0 variant published as a version bump, everything else identical. Output capped at 384 tokens. Requires target prefix-cache capability (Contract 4). Canonical suite v1 (IB-T003).
